A

addLocalFile(LocalFile) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.model.Directory
Adds a file/subdirectory to this directory.

D

DemoApplication - Class in com.codecool.demo
Entry point for the Spring Boot application.
DemoApplication() - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.DemoApplication
 
DiffRequest - Class in com.codecool.demo.model
Represents a file/directory comparison request.
DiffRequest(String, LocalFile, LocalFile) - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.model.DiffRequest
Creates a new comparison request.
DiffRequestRepository - Interface in com.codecool.demo.repository
Repository for persisting and retrieving file comparison requests.
DiffResponseDTO - Record Class in com.codecool.demo.dto
Comparison result between two file system locations.
DiffResponseDTO(String, String, Set<EntryDTO>, Set<EntryDTO>, Set<EntryDTO>) - Constructor for record class com.codecool.demo.dto.DiffResponseDTO
Creates an instance of a DiffResponseDTO record class.
Directory - Class in com.codecool.demo.model
Specialized entity representing directories.
Directory() - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.model.Directory
 
DirectoryRepository - Interface in com.codecool.demo.repository
Specialized repository for Directory entities.

E

EntryDTO - Record Class in com.codecool.demo.dto
Represents a single file system entry in comparison results.

Creates an instance of a EntryDTO record class.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.DiffResponseDTO
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.EntryDTO
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.HistoryEntryDTO
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

Returns the value of the filePathA record component.

G

getAllNestedFilesWithRelativePaths(String) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.model.Directory
Recursively collects all nested files with relative paths.
getDiff(String, String, String) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.controller.LocalFileController
Compares two file system paths for a specific user and returns the differences.
getDiffHandler(String, String, String) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.service.LocalFileService
Processes a new file/directory comparison request: Reads file structures from both paths Persists the request with username and file metadata Compares the file structures
getHistory() - Method in class com.codecool.demo.controller.LocalFileController
Retrieves the history of previous directory comparisons.
getHistory() - Method in class com.codecool.demo.service.LocalFileService
Retrieves the complete history of file comparison requests.
getTest() - Method in class com.codecool.demo.controller.LocalFileController
Test endpoint for connectivity checks.
GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.codecool.demo.controller
Global exception handler for REST controllers.
GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.controller.GlobalExceptionHandler
 

H

handleGeneralException(Exception) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.controller.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles general runtime exception.
handleLocalFileNotFound(LocalFileNotFoundException) - Method in class com.codecool.demo.controller.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles file system path resolution failures.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.DiffResponseDTO
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.EntryDTO
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.codecool.demo.dto.HistoryEntryDTO
Returns a hash code value for this object.
HistoryEntryDTO - Record Class in com.codecool.demo.dto
Historical record of a comparison operation.
HistoryEntryDTO(String, DiffResponseDTO, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for record class com.codecool.demo.dto.HistoryEntryDTO
Creates an instance of a HistoryEntryDTO record class.

L

LocalFile - Class in com.codecool.demo.model
Base entity representing a file system entry.
LocalFile() - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.model.LocalFile
 
LocalFileController - Class in com.codecool.demo.controller
REST controller for handling operations related to local file structure comparison.
LocalFileController(LocalFileService) - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.controller.LocalFileController
Constructs the controller with the provided LocalFileService.
LocalFileNotFoundException - Exception in com.codecool.demo.exception
Exception extending RuntimeException
LocalFileNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception com.codecool.demo.exception.LocalFileNotFoundException
Custom Exception to handle LocalFile not found on path.
LocalFileReader - Interface in com.codecool.demo.util
Provides functionality to read and represent file system structures as hierarchical objects.
LocalFileReaderImpl - Class in com.codecool.demo.util
Recursive file system reader that persists file/directory structures to the database.
LocalFileReaderImpl(LocalFileRepository, DirectoryRepository) - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.util.LocalFileReaderImpl
Constructs the file reader with necessary persistence repositories.
LocalFileRepository - Interface in com.codecool.demo.repository
JPA repository for LocalFile entities representing both files and directories.
LocalFileService - Class in com.codecool.demo.service
Service for comparing directory/file structures and managing comparison history.
LocalFileService(LocalFileReader, DiffRequestRepository) - Constructor for class com.codecool.demo.service.LocalFileService
LocalFileService constructor.

Main method that starts the Spring Boot application.

Reads and parses a file system location into a hierarchical representation.
